parameters.name: list_spaces
parameters.description: List all Confluence spaces (id, key, name, type). No parameters. Use this first to find a space_id for other operations.

parameters.name: list_pages_in_space
parameters.description: List pages in a space by space_id. Reliable fallback when CQL full-text search returns no results (new spaces, indexing lag). Parameters: space_id (required), limit (optional default 25).

parameters.name: search_pages
parameters.description: Full-text search using CQL. Examples: 'text ~ "onboarding"', 'space = MARKETING AND type = page', 'creator = currentUser()'. Plain text is auto-wrapped as text~query. Parameters: query (required), limit (optional default 10).

parameters.name: get_page
parameters.description: Fetch a page by id with full body (storage format HTML), version, space. Parameters: page_id (required).

parameters.name: get_page_by_title
parameters.description: Find a page by exact title (ASCII titles work reliably). Parameters: title (required), space_id (optional, scopes search to one space).

parameters.name: list_children
parameters.description: List direct child pages of a parent page. Parameters: page_id (required), limit (optional).

parameters.name: create_page
parameters.description:
Create a new page. Body MUST be storage-format HTML (e.g. '

Hello

Section

  • item
'). Parameters: space_id (required), title (required), body (required), parent_id (optional).

parameters.name: update_page
parameters.description: Update page title and/or body. Body must be storage-format HTML. Version is auto-bumped. Parameters: page_id (required), title (optional), body (optional).

parameters.name: delete_page
parameters.description: Delete a page by id. Parameters: page_id (required).

parameters.name: add_comment_to_page
parameters.description:
Add a footer comment to a page. Plain text is auto-wrapped in

; HTML is passed through. Parameters: page_id (required), text (required).

parameters.name: list_comments_on_page
parameters.description: List footer comments on a page. Parameters: page_id (required).

parameters.name: add_label_to_page
parameters.description: Add a label to a page for categorization. Label names should be lowercase with hyphens (e.g. 'meeting-notes'). Parameters: page_id (required), label (required).

parameters.name: list_labels_on_page
parameters.description: List all labels on a page. Parameters: page_id (required).

parameters.name: search_by_label
parameters.description: Find pages tagged with a specific label. Parameters: label (required), limit (optional default 25).
